algorithms.title: Seizure and Altered Mental Status Field Approach
algorithms.description: Sequence for assessing and managing a seizing or newly altered adult patient.
steps: If actively seizing: protect the airway with positioning and suction as needed (never place anything in the mouth), protect the patient from injury, and time the seizure.
Check blood glucose as soon as feasible; treat hypoglycemia per protocol if present.
If the seizure resolves in under 5 minutes: provide postictal supportive care, monitor for gradual improvement, and transport.

If seizure activity reaches 5 minutes or repeats without return to baseline: treat as status epilepticus — escalate per local ALS protocol (airway/oxygen support, benzodiazepine per protocol) and transport rapidly.
If altered but not seizing: check glucose immediately, then work through AEIOU-TIPS for reversible causes.
Gather a focused history from bystanders/family: medications, known seizure disorder, substance use, recent illness or head injury.
Reassess mental status trend continuously; a lack of gradual improvement warrants continued investigation and prompt transport.
